import torch.nn as nn

class MLP(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dim, hidden_dim=256, dropout=0.2):
        super().__init__()
        self.input_dim = input_dim
        self.hidden_dim = hidden_dim
        self.dropout_p = dropout
        h = hidden_dim
        self.net = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(input_dim, h),
            nn.BatchNorm1d(h),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(dropout),
            nn.Linear(h, h // 2),
            nn.BatchNorm1d(h // 2),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(dropout),
            nn.Linear(h // 2, h // 4),
            nn.BatchNorm1d(h // 4),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(dropout),
            nn.Linear(h // 4, 1),
        )

    def forward(self, x):
        return self.net(x).squeeze(-1)
